---
title: "Lectures & Labs"
---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Course Playlist
[YouTube Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLftoLyLEwECBg6Rs3JnMAJCSwYcr3Xq1r)
:::

## Schedule

| Date | Type | # | Topic | Materials | Recording |
|------|------|---|-------|-----------|-----------|
| 7 Jan | Lecture | 1 | Data Collection | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week01-data-collection-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week01-data-collection-lecture.pdf) \| [API Demo](https://huggingface.co/spaces/Nipun/api-testing) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=W76ktQa7BB8) |
| 9 Jan | Lab | 1 | Data Collection Lab | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week01-data-collection-lab.html) | |
| 10 Jan | Lecture | 2 | Data Collection continued (HTML parsing) | [DOM Viewer](https://nipunbatra.github.io/dom-tree-viewer/) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g07rDAr7ueY) |
| | Lecture | 3 | Data Validation | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week02-data-validation-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week02-data-validation-lecture.pdf) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8_pptikTX0g) |
| | Lab | 2 | Data Collection Lab | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week01-data-collection-lab.html) | |
| | Lab | 3 | Data Validation Lab | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week02-data-validation-lab.html) | |
| 12 Jan | Lab | 4 | Data Validation Lab (continued) | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week02-data-validation-lab.html) | |
| 14 Jan | | | *Holiday* | | |
| 16 Jan | Lecture | 4 | Data Labeling | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week03-data-labeling-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week03-data-labeling-lecture.pdf) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vESABn1eAOI) |
| 27 Jan | Lab | 5 | Data Labeling Lab | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/labs/week03-data-labeling-lab.html) | |
| 28 Jan | Lecture | 5 | Optimizing Data Labeling: Active Learning, Weak Supervision & LLMs | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week04-optimizing-labeling-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week04-optimizing-labeling-lecture.pdf) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sw_aqSIWBZc) |
| 4 Feb | Lecture | 6 | Data Augmentation | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week05-data-augmentation-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week05-data-augmentation-lecture.pdf) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=32bknvkw60o) |
| 11 Feb | Lecture | 7 | LLM APIs & Multimodal AI | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week06-llm-apis-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week06-llm-apis-lecture.pdf) | [Video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EAUBdpXARbY) |
| 11 Mar | Lecture | 8 | Model Evaluation: Cross-Validation, Bias-Variance | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week07-model-development-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week07-model-development-lecture.pdf) | |
| 18 Mar | Lecture | 9 | Tuning, AutoML & Experiment Tracking | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week08-tuning-tracking-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week08-tuning-tracking-lecture.pdf) | |
| 25 Mar | Lecture | 10 | Reproducibility: Docker, Seeds & Tracking | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week09-reproducibility-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week09-reproducibility-lecture.pdf) \| [Docker Demos](https://github.com/nipunbatra/docker-ml-demos) | |
| | Lecture | 11 | Data Drift & Model Monitoring | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week10-data-drift-lecture.html) \| [Notebook](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/lecture-demos/week10/data_drift_notebook.html) | |
| 1 Apr | Lecture | 12 | Profiling & Quantization | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week11-profiling-quantization-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week11-profiling-quantization-lecture.pdf) \| [Colab Notebooks](https://github.com/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/tree/master/lecture-demos/week11/colab-notebooks) | |
| 8 Apr | Lecture | 13 | Building AI Agents from Scratch | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week12-agents-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week12-agents-lecture.pdf) \| [Colab Notebook](https://colab.research.google.com/github/nipunbatra/stt-ai-teaching/blob/master/lecture-demos/week12/colab-notebooks/01-agents-from-scratch.ipynb) | |
| | Lecture | 14 | Course Summary & What's Next | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week13-course-summary-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week13-course-summary-lecture.pdf) | |

: {.striped .hover}

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Additional Content (covered in labs)

| Type | Topic | Materials |
|------|-------|-----------|
| Lab | From Script to Web App | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week10-web-apps-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week10-web-apps-lecture.pdf) |
| Lab | APIs & Demos | [HTML](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/html/week12-apis-lecture.html) \| [PDF](https://nipunbatra.github.io/stt-ai-teaching/pdf/week12-apis-lecture.pdf) |
:::
